name: University of the Witwatersrand
description: One of Africa's leading research universities, known for excellence in engineering, medicine, and sciences.

name: University of Cape Town
description: Africa's oldest university and consistently ranked as the top university on the continent.

name: University of Pretoria
description: A leading research-intensive university offering a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes.

name: Stellenbosch University
description: A world-class university known for innovation, research excellence, and beautiful campus setting.

name: University of Johannesburg
description: A vibrant, multicultural university offering accessible quality education in the heart of Johannesburg.

name: Durban University of Technology
description: A leading university of technology offering career-focused qualifications with strong industry links.

name: Ekurhuleni East TVET College
description: A public TVET college offering NCV and Report 191 programmes with practical skills training.

name: False Bay TVET College
description: A leading Western Cape TVET college with modern facilities and strong industry partnerships.

name: Rosebank College
description: A well-established private college offering accredited diplomas and degrees in business and IT.

name: Boston City Campus
description: One of SA's largest private education providers with campuses nationwide and flexible study options.
